introSection: Super Flight is a steel flying roller coaster located at Playland Park in Rye, New York, USA.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 4 cars. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Super Flight is a steel flying roller coaster located at Playland Park in Rye, New York, USA.



4 cars. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.
